TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Bidhya_Devi_Bhandari, title = Bidhya_Devi_Bhandari, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bidhya_Devi_Bhandari} }

S.FORM: == Bidhya Devi Bhandari == u siwkay niza 6 bulad 19 demiad, Bidhya Devi Bhandari, u misingkiway. 1961 a mihca nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Nepal ayza sa ci Bidhya Devi Bhandari, micakat a demiad sa i 2015 a mihca 10 bulad 29 demiad. u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam: ÁĘßťõÖ¬∑śąīÁ∂≠¬∑ÁŹ≠ťĀĒťáĆ u sulit nu u sulit nu Lipun: „Éď„ÉČ„É§„ÉĽ„Éá„Éď„ÉĽ„Éź„É≥„ÉÄ„É™ u sulit nu Amilaka: Bidhya Devi Bhandari kakuniza
S.PHON: == bidńßja d…ô*i bńßandari == u siwkaj niza * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, bidńßja d…ô*i bńßandari, u misiŇčkiwaj. **** a mińß ¶a nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan. u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu n…ôpar~…ĺ ajza sa ¶i bidńßja d…ô*i bńßandari, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶a ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad. u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ********* u sur~…ĺit nu u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun: *********** u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺaka: bidńßja d…ô*i bńßandari kakuniza
S.FORM: == Bidhya Devi Bhandari == u siwkay niza 6 bulad 19 demiad, Bidhya Devi Bhandari, u misingkiway. 1961 a mihca nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Nepal ayza sa ci Bidhya Devi Bhandari, micakat a demiad sa i 2015 a mihca 10 bulad 29 demiad. u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam: ÁĘßťõÖ¬∑śąīÁ∂≠¬∑ÁŹ≠ťĀĒťáĆ u sulit nu u sulit nu Lipun: „Éď„ÉČ„É§„ÉĽ„Éá„Éď„ÉĽ„Éź„É≥„ÉÄ„É™ u sulit nu Amilaka: Bidhya Devi Bhandari kakuniza
S.PHON: == bidńßja d…ô*i bńßandari == u siwkaj niza * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, bidńßja d…ô*i bńßandari, u misiŇčkiwaj. **** a mińß ¶a nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan. u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu n…ôpar~…ĺ ajza sa ¶i bidńßja d…ô*i bńßandari, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶a ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad. u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ********* u sur~…ĺit nu u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun: *********** u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺaka: bidńßja d…ô*i bńßandari kakuniza
